stemHtml: A wheel was due to be replaced. As the commander approaches the aircraft he finds a wheel on the trolley, however nothing is logged in the tech log. What should the commander do?

options.a: Ask maintenance to sign it off.
options.b: If the commander signs it off then it is good to go.
options.c: Ask the maintance for verbal confirmation that the work has been done.
options.d: It does not need to be logged.
